title: Christmas Wired Ribbon Red and White Stripes Candy Cane Ribbon for Christmas Tree Decorations Gift Wrapping Bow Making Wreath Embellishing or DIY Crafts, 63mm*10 Yards
features: Festive Decoration: This ribbon is perfect for Christmas tree decorations, gift wrapping, bow making, wreath embellishing, or DIY crafts.
Glittery Design: The ribbon features a glittery striped pattern, adding a touch of sparkle to your holiday decor.
Wired Edge: With a wired edge, the ribbon can be easily shaped and manipulated to create bows, curls, and other decorative elements.
Dimensions: Each roll measures 63mm (2.48 inches) wide and 10 yards (9.14 metres) long, providing ample length for various projects.
Versatile Material: Made of high-quality material, this ribbon is durable and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.
